sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52494" key="kalamh/tria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλᾰμή-τρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n52494.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gatherer of stalks, gleaner</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.784a</biblScope> </bibl> (nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-τρίδας</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
